text:
sports competition, event, during which one or more sporting events are held, also known as competition, sporting competition, sport competition, match. Attributes include: 
- different from: "elite sport competition",
 "sport",
 "sporting event"
- Commons category: "Sports competitions"
- main Wikidata property: "sports competition competed at"
- part of: "culture",
 "game"
- has part(s) of the class: "sporting event"
- properties for this type: "sport",
 "country",
 "number of participants",
 "inception"
